---
title: "v4_s3_no_attn"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Attention ablation for the v4 residual FM U-Net.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | CNO v2_loggrad + U-Net FM without bottleneck attention |
| Objective | Flow Matching on `HR - mu` |
| Motivation | measure whether attention helps residual structure placement |
| Research inspiration | U-Net attention ablations in generative downscaling |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v4_s3_no_attn/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v4_s3_no_attn.csv`
